view.title: Validate persona scenario #4

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of onboarding new staff with a corporate template, but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the actual execution of this scenario or its outcomes. The expected result states that the scenario behavior should either be confirmed as supported or produce a clear failure report, yet the evidence does not include any traces or snapshots that would allow for such validation. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of supporting evidence.
